title: TransportConfig/AuthProvider split: TLS config and credential injection are separate traits
description: Previously CustomCaAuth combined TLS trust-root installation with the AuthProvider interface, making --ca-cert mutually exclusive with --bearer-token and --basic-auth. The split into TransportConfig (build_client) and AuthProvider (auth_header) allows any transport to be paired with any credential scheme. A contributor might suggest collapsing them back into one trait to reduce the public API surface — this must be resisted: the whole point is that the two concerns are orthogonal. Kith (and any private-CA server that also uses Bearer or Basic auth) requires both simultaneously.
close_reason: Decision recorded during idfq epic implementation; design intentionally retained as-is.
